reach_why: Combines known worries about priors, feedback loops, and compression; not wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links Deutschian hard-to-vary criteria with recursive search contamination and elegant falsehood bias.
falsifiable_why: Test by constructing systems where recursive compounding and compression do not increase polished falsehoods.
explanation: Self-reinforcing search can mistake human-biased, compressed elegance for truth and stabilize error.
